---
title: "Prevalence estimates for Takayasu arteritis in England by Demographic Group"
author: "SJ Lax"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
  pdf_document: default
---

### Setup

```{r setup}
#install packages at first use
#install.packages("tidyverse", repos = "https://packages.sde.digital.nhs.uk/repository/cran-mirror/", dependencies = TRUE)
#install.packages("knitr", repos = "https://packages.sde.digital.nhs.uk/repository/cran-mirror/", dependencies = TRUE)
#install.packages("kableExtra", repos = "https://packages.sde.digital.nhs.uk/repository/cran-mirror/", dependencies = TRUE)

#setup markdown
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

#load packages
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

setwd("D:/PhotonUser/My Files/Home Folder/ccu075_01")

# Get data
prevalence_cohort_England <- read.csv2("ccu075_01_M314_p_cohort_20241007.csv")
denominators_2022 <- read.csv("ccu075_01_denominators_age_group_sex_IMD_20241009.csv")
```

### Prevalent cohort: crude rate ratio by IMD

```{r ratios}
# Set parameters for analyses
CI_level <- 0.95
rate_multiplier <- 1000000

#Compile cases and denominator dataset where age is grouped
grouped_demographics <- prevalence_cohort_England %>%
  select(-age_group) %>%
  group_by(QUINTILE, sex, age_group_index) %>%
  summarise(cases = n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  rename(IMD = QUINTILE,
         age_group = age_group_index)

denominators_2022_grouped <- denominators_2022 %>%
  group_by(IMD, sex, age_group) %>%
  summarise(population = sum(as.numeric(Population))) %>%
  mutate(IMD = as.numeric(IMD))

merged_grouped <- full_join(grouped_demographics, denominators_2022_grouped, by=c("IMD", "sex", "age_group")) %>%
  mutate(cases = ifelse(is.na(cases), 0, cases))
```

### Adjusted prevalence ratios: age and sex

```{r prevalence_odds, message=FALSE}
adjusted_prev_rates_by_IMD <- merged_grouped %>%
  mutate(Cases_for_calculations = ifelse(cases == 0, 1, cases)) #Doesn't suppress counts but resolves 0 to 1 to enable code to parse

adjusted_prev_rates_by_IMD$sex <- factor(adjusted_prev_rates_by_IMD$sex, levels=c("Male", "Female"))

adjusted_prev_rates_by_IMD$age_group <- factor(adjusted_prev_rates_by_IMD$age_group, levels=c("16-39", 
                                                                                              "0-15", 
                                                                                              "40-54", 
                                                                                              "55-69", 
                                                                                              "70-84", 
                                                                                              "85-90"))

adjusted_prev_rates_by_IMD <- adjusted_prev_rates_by_IMD %>%
  mutate(IMD = as.factor(IMD))

poisson.model_IMD <- glm(formula = Cases_for_calculations ~ age_group + sex, 
                         offset = log(population),
                         family = poisson(link="log"), 
                         data = adjusted_prev_rates_by_IMD)

summary(poisson.model_IMD)

ecm <- exp(coef(poisson.model_IMD))
ci <- exp(confint(poisson.model_IMD))

collated_ORs <- data.frame(rbind(c(Group = "Male", OR = 1, Lower_CI = NA, Upper_CI = NA),
                                       c(Group = "Female (adjusted by age group)", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="Female")][[1]],2),
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="Female"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="Female"),][[2]],2)), 
                                 c(Group = "0-15 (adjusted by sex)", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="0-15")][[1]],2), 
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="0-15"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="0-15"),][[2]],2)),
                                       c(Group = "16-39", 
                                         OR = 1, 
                                         Lower_CI = NA, 
                                         Upper_CI = NA),
                                       c(Group = "40-54 (adjusted by sex)", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="40-54")][[1]],2), 
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="40-54"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="40-54"),][[2]],2)),
                                       c(Group = "55-69 (adjusted by sex)", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="55-69")][[1]],2), 
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="55-69"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="55-69"),][[2]],2)),
                                       c(Group = "70-84 (adjusted by sex)", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="70-84")][[1]],2), 
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="70-84"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="70-84"),][[2]],2)),
                                       c(Group = "85-90 (adjusted by sex)", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="85-90")][[1]],2), 
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="85-90"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="85-90"),][[2]],2))
)
)
```

### Adjusted prevalence ratios: IMD, age and sex

```{r prevalence_odds_adj, message=FALSE}
poisson.model_IMD2 <- glm(formula = Cases_for_calculations ~ IMD + age_group + sex, 
                         offset = log(population),
                         family = poisson(link="log"), 
                         data = adjusted_prev_rates_by_IMD)

summary(poisson.model_IMD2)

### check these
# poisson.model_IMD2$deviance/poisson.model_IMD2$df.residual < 2
# plot(poisson.model_IMD2) - these look OK

ecm <- exp(coef(poisson.model_IMD2))
ci <- exp(confint(poisson.model_IMD2))

collated_ORs <- data.frame(rbind(collated_ORs,
                                       c(Group = "Female (adjusted by age group and IMD)", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="Female")][[1]],2),
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="Female"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="Female"),][[2]],2)), 
                                 c(Group = "0-15 (adjusted by sex and IMD)", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="0-15")][[1]],2), 
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="0-15"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="0-15"),][[2]],2)),
                                       c(Group = "16-39", 
                                         OR = 1, 
                                         Lower_CI = NA, 
                                         Upper_CI = NA),
                                       c(Group = "40-54 (adjusted by sex and IMD)", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="40-54")][[1]],2), 
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="40-54"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="40-54"),][[2]],2)),
                                       c(Group = "55-69 (adjusted by sex and IMD)", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="55-69")][[1]],2), 
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="55-69"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="55-69"),][[2]],2)),
                                       c(Group = "70-84 (adjusted by sex and IMD)", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="70-84")][[1]],2), 
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="70-84"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="70-84"),][[2]],2)),
                                       c(Group = "85-90 (adjusted by sex and IMD)", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="85-90")][[1]],2), 
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="85-90"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="85-90"),][[2]],2)),
                                 c(Group = "IMD1", 
                                         OR = 1, 
                                         Lower_CI = NA, 
                                         Upper_CI = NA),
                                       c(Group = "IMD2 (adjusted by sex and age group)", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="IMD2")][[1]],2), 
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="IMD2"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="IMD2"),][[2]],2)),
                                       c(Group = "IMD3 (adjusted by sex and age group)", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="IMD3")][[1]],2), 
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="IMD3"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="IMD3"),][[2]],2)),
                                       c(Group = "IMD4 (adjusted by sex and age group)", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="IMD4")][[1]],2), 
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="IMD4"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="IMD4"),][[2]],2)),
                                       c(Group = "IMD5 (adjusted by sex and age group)", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="IMD5")][[1]],2), 
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="IMD5"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="IMD5"),][[2]],2))
                                 )
                           )
```

```{R export}
#Print table
collated_ORs %>%
  kable(booktabs=TRUE, align="l", col.names = c("Group", 
                       "Odds ratio", 
                       "95% CI lower bound",
                       "95% CI upper bound"))

#write.csv(collated_ORs, "ccu075_01_M314_prev_ratios_IMD_20250203.csv")

# Contextual information
# Adjusted prevalence ratios for Takayasu arteritis by demographic group: 1st July 2022 (age, sex, IMD)
# 
# Column 1: Demographic group relating to the specific incidence rate ratio, with details of the model adjustments in parentheses.
# Column 2: Prevalence ratio of diagnosis with Takayasu arteritis within each demographic group (1 indicates reference group)
# Column 3: Poisson 95% confidence interval lower bound
# Column 4: Poisson 95% confidence interval upper bound
```

### Version

```{r version, echo=FALSE}
sessionInfo()
```
